author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas: Golden Era 3D Pre-alpha is LIVE

Achieve prosperity with the first 3D pre-alpha build of Star Atlas: Golden Era now!

Fully onchain gaming allows both SAGE and SAGE Labs to run on the on the same game ID. This means whatever happens in one experience will reflect in the other.  

Should you encounter a bug during your journey, report it in ⁠No Access and switch to SAGE Labs while we work on a fix.  

Good luck pilots!

  | Play now: https://sage.staratlas.com/
